clarifications.resolution: Sync constitution.md Gate field to reference enforce-agent-authority.cjs as primary enforcement hook

clarifications.topic: Documented severity (WARN) diverges from real behaviour (BLOCK)
clarifications.resolution: Update enforcement-gates.md to BLOCK-by-default, consistent with commit f458793 and gate-logs

clarifications.topic: Config flag frameworkProtection:false contradicts effective L1/L2 protection
clarifications.resolution: Set frameworkProtection:true (project context) + document settings.json deny rules as source of truth

clarifications.topic: 'Same module' import exception lacks operational boundary
clarifications.resolution: Define 'same module' as same directory or direct subdirectory of the feature folder; optionally express as ESLint rule

implementation_sequence: AMB-001 + AMB-004 (bundled into constitution v1.1.0, required anyway for V-DRIFT-004)
security_note: No clarification weakens any gate. AMB-002 confirms the safer BLOCK-by-default state. AMB-003 corrects a misleading flag while real protection (deny rules) is already active.
backward_compat_note: All resolutions are doc/config-level and idempotent. AMB-003 changes a flag but observable behaviour is unchanged (deny rules already block L1/L2). Zero breaking change expected.
